title: Marketplace Manager - Fabindia Online - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Fabindia Online - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Fabindia Online invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Marketplace Manager at our Srinagar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Fabindia Online:
Fabindia Online is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fabindia Online!
